subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen enjoineth upon Its loved ones two things: first, wisdom, that no harm may befall anyone [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی وصیت میفرماید احبای خود را بدو امر اول حکمت تا بر احدی ضری واقع نشود
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @contention and conflict, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @call to action, @wisdom [hikmat]
